member.name: M:AccountId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from a string.
member.param: a string representing a valid account id
member.exception: when the account id and checksum are invalid

member.name: M:AccountId.FromEvmAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from an EVM address.
member.param: a string representing the EVM address
member.returns:
the account id object
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:AccountId.FromEvmAddress(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from an EVM address.
member.param: a string representing the EVM address
the shard part of the account id
the shard realm of the account id
member.returns:
the account id object
In case shard and realm are unknown, they should be set to zero

member.name: M:AccountId.FromEvmAddress(EvmAddress)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from an EVM address.
member.returns:
the account id object
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:AccountId.FromEvmAddress(EvmAddress,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from an EVM address.
member.param: the shard part of the account id
the shard realm of the account id
member.returns:
the account id object
In case shard and realm are unknown, they should be set to zero

member.name: M:AccountId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from a solidity address.
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis method is deprecated. Use {@link #fromEvmAddress(EvmAddress, long, long)} instead.

member.name: M:AccountId.FromProtobuf(Proto.AccountID)
member.summary: Retrieve the account id from a protobuf.

member.name: P:AccountId.Shard
member.summary: The shard number

member.name: P:AccountId.Realm
member.summary: The realm number

member.name: P:AccountId.Num
member.summary: The id number

member.name: P:AccountId.AliasKey
member.summary: The public key bytes to be used as the account's alias

member.name: P:AccountId.EvmAddress
member.summary: The ethereum account 20-byte EVM address to be used initially in place of the public key bytes

member.name: M:AccountId.ToSolidityAddress
member.summary: Extract the solidity address.
member.returns: the solidity address as a string

member.name: M:AccountId.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: toEvmAddress returns EVM-compatible address representation of the entity

member.name: M:AccountId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Extract the account id protobuf.

member.name: M:AccountId.PopulateAccountNum(Client)
member.summary: Gets the actual `num` field of the `AccountId` from the Mirror Node. Should be used after generating `AccountId.fromEvmAddress()` because it sets the `num` field to `0` automatically since there is no connection between the `num` and the `evmAddress` Sync version

member.name: M:AccountId.PopulateAccountNumAsync(Client)
member.summary: Gets the actual `num` field of the `AccountId` from the Mirror Node. Should be used after generating `AccountId.fromEvmAddress()` because it sets the `num` field to `0` automatically since there is no connection between the `num` and the `evmAddress` Async version
member.remarks: @deprecatedUse 'populateAccountNum' instead due to its nearly identical operation.

member.name: M:AccountId.PopulateAccountEvmAddress(Client)
member.summary: Populates `evmAddress` field of the `AccountId` extracted from the Mirror Node. Sync version

member.name: M:AccountId.PopulateAccountEvmAddressAsync(Client)
member.summary: Populates `evmAddress` field of the `AccountId` extracted from the Mirror Node. Async version
member.remarks: @deprecatedUse 'populateAccountEvmAddress' instead due to its nearly identical operation.

member.name: M:AccountId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:AccountId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Verify that the client has a valid checksum.
member.exception: when the account id and checksum are invalid

member.name: M:AccountId.ToBytes
member.summary: Extract a byte array representation.

member.name: M:AccountId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Extract a string representation with the checksum.
